title: Perform live lookup search from Monday field to External system

posts.author: Roi_kapah (Roi Kapah)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Guys,
I was checking the Integration guides and only found background actions (via the API), and I am looking for a way to implement the following search from external system:

  1. user perform search from Monday Board Column , pressing a button for example, than a rest call being made to external system (with some dependency input of another column)
  2. list of options are being populated into the target field in that board so the user can select.

I know how to do #1, but I can’t find a way to do #2 .

I know that I can implement it custom widget/board view (I think ).

any suggestions? live integration, live search with results to be select.

Thanks
Roi

posts.author: rob (Roberto Tremonti)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Roi_kapah
Unfortunately currently there’s no way to create custom columns with dynamic options à-la Location.
